# o2-scalpel-clojure

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Clojure via clojure-lsp

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-clojure --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `clojure-lsp` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .clj, .cljs, .cljc, .edn

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_extract` | Extract selection into a function or let-binding |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply clj-kondo + clojure-lsp diagnostic quick-fixes |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
